subject: New Request: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the e-commerce sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Software Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Java
• MySQL

Details:
Client: NordKart
Start: 2025-05-07
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1025 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
